expectations.evidence: Output starts with 'Звучит как хороший шаг — превратить правило в чек-лист самопроверки'. Gives advice on content, no audit verdict

expectations.text: Output does NOT fabricate fake problems on clean draft
expectations.evidence: Baseline didn't audit at all, so technically didn't fabricate problems — gave advice instead. Trivially passes the negative assertion

expectations.text: Output lists passed criteria (5 anchor points / no jargon / causal link present)
expectations.evidence: No criteria checklist; baseline gives 4 suggestions on improving the workflow
